channel.title: Help with redirection
channel.description:
Hello,
Im following the redirections video that was published with the latest update (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_ZNgyXJxeGM&feature=emb_logo). But it is not working. I have the latest frontity packages installed and using the Redirection plugin in wordpress. Frontity doesn't seem to get the redirections since it results in 404 when I go to the redirection i have created. Is there anything else I have missed?

item.title: Help with redirection
item.dc:creator: abhishek.kumar
item.description:
can you help me with redirections?

Read full topic

item.title: Help with redirection
item.dc:creator: adam
item.description:
I found the problem.

I was missing setting the state.source.url!

Read full topic

item.title: Help with redirection
item.dc:creator: adam
item.description:
Hello,

Im following the redirections video that was published with the latest update (Redirects stored in WordPress database - YouTube). But it is not working. I have the latest frontity packages installed and using the Redirection plugin in wordpress. Frontity doesn’t seem to get the redirections since it results in 404 when I go to the redirection i have created. Is there anything else I have missed?

Read full topic
